name: Tool response with credential prose but no secret material (must not warn)
notes: F10 DLP FP guard. Prose about API keys / bearer tokens must not trigger the credential-egress signature — only structural, prefix-anchored credential shapes do (the 2026-07 'Bearer token' phrase lesson).

content.text: To authenticate, set your API key in the config and send it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Never commit your secret to source control.
